title: reel shit
body:
))}}

my music is everything but the movie
screen i move in everything but what i do be
do be do be doin
i'm a scooby snack passed between two hack detectives
hackin off invectives
hack and cough back and forth to practice hackin the incentives
i'm attacking through the capillaries
whispers trickle from the back of alleys
they forgot to be content with when they started sellin every
backword story i've ingested
poison i had to contend with
i could never vomit enough
i had to focus on digestion
the only thing i know is i'm not tryin to die yet
to me every colon is a question
the contents inform the pressure
the strength it takes to void it
the pain that leads to suffering when we think we can avoid it
even after death we never have that choice
our very last acts reveal the path back
our bass ackwards approach to life
there's only one way to heal that fissure
get your head out your ass and let shit go
if it's small enough to pass
and if it's light enough to hold it
please take a moment
find a place you feel safe and go in
check the plumbing
it's easy when we can flush it
but even if you can't and your out in public
there's nothing to be ashamed of
that's something we can all help clean up
that's part of the point of public spaces
even if people can't help makin faces
the trust is a process
it's won't always be painless
and i promise you almost no one likes the reasons they're famous

))}}

))}}
